title: Rick J. Bryant
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Rick J. Bryant''' is a comic-book artist who inked an issue of [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel's ''Star Wars'']] comic series as well as illustrating several pin-ups in the [[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (Marvel Comics 1983)|''Star Wars Return of the Jedi'']] series.

==''Star Wars'' bibliography==
===Inker===
*[[Star Wars (1977) 50|''Star Wars'' (1977) 50]]
